Careers

Build the teams behind AI-first delivery

Join ConglomerateIT across engineering, QA, cloud, AI, data, enterprise platforms, and global delivery operations.

Open roles

Talent for the next generation of enterprise technology.

AI Solutions Architect

Culture

Cross-border teams, client-first delivery, constant learning.

AI-first learning

Work on modern AI, data, cloud, QA, and platform programs with room to keep learning.

Global exposure

Collaborate across US, Canada, India, and UK teams with enterprise clients and cross-border delivery.

Growth mindset

CGIT emphasizes ownership, learning, mentorship, and progression into high-impact roles.

Inclusive culture

The company culture emphasizes innovation, client-first delivery, and women empowerment in technology.

Transforming businesses with tomorrow's technology, today. Global IT services across 4 countries, 500+ projects, 12 years of experience, and 95% client retention.
